description: Lines 776-797 contain backward-compatible top-level functions and an alias: RefreshHealthMonitor alias, two overloads of refresh_all, and start_refresh_loop. The two refresh_all overloads are confusing (one uses default services, one takes injected services) and create ambiguity. Consider: (1) migrating callers to use RefreshLoop.refresh_all directly, (2) keeping only the convenience overload if needed, (3) moving the alias to the caller files (admin_controller, api_base_controller) so they import RefreshLoop::RefreshHealthMonitor explicitly.
title: Clean up backward-compat API shims at file bottom
